semantic_description: A company or organization record. Central entity linking contacts and opportunities. Master data with indefinite lifecycle — no status progression, treated as long-lived reference.
lifecycle_description: No status lifecycle — accounts are long-lived master entities.

description: Contact person linked to an account
semantic_description: A person at a customer company. Linked to an account for organizational context. May participate in multiple opportunities and activities.
lifecycle_description: No status lifecycle — long-lived master entity.

semantic_description: A sales prospect representing early interest from a potential customer. Tracked from initial capture through contact attempts, qualification assessment, and conversion to an opportunity or loss.
lifecycle_description: NEW → CONTACTED → QUALIFIED → CONVERTED (to opportunity) / LOST

description: Sales opportunity linked to an account
semantic_description: A sales deal opportunity representing a qualified prospect progressing through the sales pipeline. Tracked from discovery through proposal, negotiation, and close (won or lost).
lifecycle_description: DISCOVERY → QUALIFICATION → PROPOSAL → NEGOTIATION → CLOSED_WON / CLOSED_LOST

description: CRM activity log (call, visit, email, meeting)
semantic_description: A unified activity record capturing all customer interactions: tasks, calls, emails, meetings, notes, and visits. Each activity has a type, subject, date, and optional assignment.
lifecycle_description: OPEN → IN_PROGRESS → DONE / CANCELLED (for task type). Other activity types (call/email/meeting/visit/note) are primarily logged.

semantic_description: A marketing campaign representing a planned or active lead generation or customer engagement initiative. Tracks campaign type, date range, budget, and status.
